ATTACH TABLE my_table AS SELECT * FROM my_database.my_table;
ATTACH TABLE my_table WITH UUID '123e4567-e89b-12d3-a456-426614174000' TO my_database.my_table;

ATTACH TABLE my_replicated_table AS my_table ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/path/to/zookeeper', 'replica_name') SETTINGS default_replica_path = '/default/path', default_replica_name = 'default_replica';
ATTACH TABLE tmp_table AS (SELECT * FROM another_table WHERE value > 100);
ATTACH TABLE report_data AS SELECT * FROM archived_reports WHERE date >= '2023-01-01' AND date < '2023-10-01';
ATTACH TABLE logs TO my_database.logs_table ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY timestamp;
ATTACH TABLE user_sessions AS SELECT * FROM user_activity WHERE session_id IS NOT NULL;
ATTACH TABLE new_table ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id; ATTACH TABLE new_table FROM '/data/new_table/';
ATTACH TABLE merged_data AS SELECT a.*, b.amount FROM table_a AS a JOIN table_b AS b ON a.id = b.id;
ATTACH TABLE replicated_table ENGINE = ReplicatedMergeTree('/table/path', 'replica_name'); SYSTEM RESTORE REPLICA replicated_table FROM ZKPATH;
